steps.title: Identify what the evidence demonstrates
steps.content: The standard view predicted liberalization would help companies raise money. Henry found that companies in liberalizing countries did receive significant investment increases. The evidence validates the prediction.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the answer
steps.content:
Choice A directly identifies what happened: empirical evidence matched the scholarly consensus.

The other options either misread the timing of the benefits (B), invent negative effects not presented in the passage (C), or make country-specific comparisons without textual support (D).

The economist's findings confirm what economists predicted would occur.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
